intro: Combesia campestris is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, offering several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
